# PropAi Sync

> PropAi Sync is an AI-powered WhatsApp follow-up and lead qualification platform for Indian real estate teams.

## What PropAi Sync Does

- Automates first-response lead conversations on WhatsApp
- Qualifies buyers by budget, locality, and timeline
- Helps brokers schedule site visits and team follow-ups
- Gives teams a shared control panel for setup, usage, devices, webhooks, and conversations

## Primary URLs

- Website: https://www.propai.live/
- Contact: https://www.propai.live/contact
- App: https://app.propai.live/assistant
- Docs: https://app.propai.live/docs
- API health: https://api.propai.live/health
- AI WhatsApp automation for real estate: https://www.propai.live/ai-whatsapp-automation-real-estate
- WhatsApp lead qualification for brokers: https://www.propai.live/whatsapp-lead-qualification
- Real estate AI assistant in India: https://www.propai.live/real-estate-ai-assistant-india

## Intended Audience

- Real estate brokers
- Channel partners
- Sales teams using WhatsApp as a primary lead channel
- Indian real estate agencies that want faster lead response without losing human handoff control

## Key Topics

- AI WhatsApp automation
- Real estate lead qualification
- Site visit scheduling
- Broker team workflows
- WhatsApp Business API setup

## Company

- Brand: PropAi Sync
- Built by: Chaos Craft Labs
